title: hedera helix f. poetarum
intro: Hedera helix f. poetarum, also known as English ivy, is a variety of the evergreen climbing plant Hedera helix. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to act as an expectorant and a bronchodilator. The health benefits of Hedera helix f. poetarum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Hedera helix f. poetarum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, as well as to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
